## Meeting Purpose

[Final interview with Jess Scott for Managing Editor role at fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jess has strong writing skills, brand consistency expertise, and experience with AI content tools](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [fwd.digital is growing rapidly (0 to 21 clients in 6 months) and needs strategic thinkers to scale operations](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Role involves managing client accounts, developing content strategies, and optimizing AI-assisted workflows](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [Company culture emphasizes continuous learning, cross-functional collaboration, and balancing AI with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Background and Motivation

  - [Jess has diverse writing experience across healthcare, tech, and niche industries](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Motivated by learning opportunities and working with cutting-edge AI content tools](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Strong interest in fwd.digital's innovative approach and collaborative environment](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)

### Company Growth and Structure

  - [Launched in May 2023, now at 21 clients and 12-15 full-time employees](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
  - [7 current Managing Editors, hiring 3-5 more](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)
  - [Remote-first with office in Bay Area; team members across multiple countries](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
  - [Rapid growth led to some hiring challenges; now focused on "up-leveling" talent](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=2297.0)

### Role Responsibilities and Expectations

  - [Manage multiple client accounts, develop content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [Optimize AI-assisted workflows for content creation (100-200 step processes)](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Balance AI automation with human expertise and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Potential growth paths: operations, workflow optimization, client expansion, sales](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

### AI Integration in Content Creation

  - [Use AI for initial content generation, research, and workflow optimization](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Human editors provide strategic oversight, quality control, and client management](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Goal: Elevate human capabilities rather than replace them](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)

### Work Culture and Communication

  - [Emphasis on asynchronous communication and documentation](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=2071.0)
  - [4+ hours of overlap with Pacific Time required for global team](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=2265.0)
  - [Continuous improvement mindset; learning from each client engagement](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=2297.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete reference checks this week](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=2536.0)
  - [Make final hiring decisions by early next week at the latest](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=2536.0)
  - [Target start date: Monday after Thanksgiving (flexible)](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=2536.0)
  - Jess to reach out with any additional questions
  - [fwd.digital to move quickly on next steps and communicate decision](https://fathom.video/share/zQFT8ocu7X4sJbHevL57iR3PbQ6zYtqy?tab=summary&timestamp=2592.0)
